Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class CashJournalCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.CashJournalCreate
public class CashJournalCreate extends Object
CashJournalCreate - A cash journal transfer. Funds are moved from a source account to a destination account

  • Method Details

    • amount

      public Optional<DecimalCreate> amount()
      A representation of a decimal value, such as 2.5. Clients may convert values into language-native decimal formats, such as Java's [BigDecimal][] or Python's [decimal.Decimal][].

      [BigDecimal]: https://docs.oracle.com/en/java/javase/11/docs/api/java.base/java/math/BigDecimal.html [decimal.Decimal]: https://docs.python.org/3/library/decimal.html

    • clientTransferId

      public String clientTransferId()
      The external identifier supplied by the API caller Each request must have a unique pairing of `client_transfer_id` and `source_account`

    • destinationAccount

      public String destinationAccount()
      The account that funds will be moved to

    • fullDisbursement

      public Optional<Boolean> fullDisbursement()
      Whether the entire source account balance is being withdrawn Must not be true if the `amount` is specified

    • retirementContribution

      public Optional<RetirementContributionCreate> retirementContribution()
      A contribution to a retirement account.

    • retirementDistribution

      public Optional<RetirementDistributionCreate> retirementDistribution()
      A distribution from a retirement account.

    • sourceAccount

      public String sourceAccount()
      The account that funds will be moved from
